headline: Dil Wellness wins Best Authentic Relaxation and Wellness Centre

content.text: Dil Wellness and the award record

Dil Wellness is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Authentic Relaxation and Wellness Centre. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Dil Wellness, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

GlobalLinker verifies Dil Wellness & Spa Pvt Ltd in salons, spas, and personal care. The GBE archive records the relaxation and wellness centre award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.

The Best Authentic Relaxation and Wellness Centre recognition places Dil Wellness in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
